manifest.description: Browse projects with real names and open them directly in your external filebrowser.
manifest.author: paperclip-plugin-navigator

fileBrowserBaseUrl.title: File Browser Base URL
fileBrowserBaseUrl.description: Base URL of your external filebrowser (e.g. https://files.example.com/files)

fileBrowserUser.title: File Browser Username
fileBrowserUser.description: Username for filebrowser API authentication. Required for the native file browser.

fileBrowserPassword.title: File Browser Password
fileBrowserPassword.description: Password for filebrowser API authentication. Required for the native file browser.

enableModalBrowser.title: Enable Modal Browser (Beta)
enableModalBrowser.description: When enabled, clicking Files opens an inline file browser modal instead of navigating to the external filebrowser. Beta feature — disabled by default.
